---
title: "IGNITE Vol.4"
subtitle: "Supplementary Information"
---

::::::::: grid
::: g-col-4
[![Social Dynamics in Online Eating Disorder Communities: A Multi-Platform Analysis](LM_Post.PNG)](eating_disorder.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
[![For Whom The Trigger Warns: The Effects of Trigger Warnings on Avoidance and Morbid Curiosity](images/clipboard-533692806.png)](trigger.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
[![The Effect of Resolving Uncertainty on Facial Expression, Visual Path, and Affect](images/clipboard-1450612597.png)](resolving_uncertainty.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
[![Loneliness, Isolation, and Anxiety as a Result of the COVID-19 Pandemic](images/clipboard-3577484256.png)](lisd.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
[![The Effect of Word Substitution on Perceived Meaning and Valence](images/clipboard-1660182199.png)](algospeak.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
[![Linguistic Framing and Norm Construction in Online Self-Harm Communities](images/clipboard-784562507.png)](self_harm.html)
:::
:::::::::
